overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding adventure game depicting exploration of a Gothic castle interior with floating candles and grand architecture, transitioning from the Great Hall through corridors and staircases to a snowy exterior courtyard at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall with floating candles and house dining tables

events.description: character approaches and passes through large oak doors exiting the Great Hall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the Great Hall toward the back, passing wooden house tables and floating candles overhead

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air illuminating the hall
tall gothic arched windows with blue stained glass
large stone fireplace with carved mantelpiece
long wooden dining tables with benches arranged in rows
red and gold house banner with lion emblem
tall double doors with iron hinges at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the vast Great Hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles beneath a vaulted ceiling. Stained glass windows line the right wall while house banners hang between the arched windows. The character passes long wooden dining tables and approaches the large oak exit doors at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with medieval tapestries and suits of armor

events.description: enters narrow stone corridor from the Great Hall, lighting shifts to wall sconces
approaches carved wooden doors at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit stone corridor toward the next set of doors

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls with gothic architectural details
colorful woven tapestries depicting heraldic scenes
full plate armor suits standing in alcoves
wrought iron torch holders with flames mounted on walls
heavy oak doors with intricate carvings at corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow enclosed corridor with stone walls illuminated by iron wall sconces. Medieval tapestries and suits of armor line the passage as the character walks toward the carved wooden doors at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with vaulted ceiling and moving staircases

events.description: enters grand staircase hall with high vaulted ceiling and elaborate stone architecture
begins ascending the grand stone staircase
approaches and opens large iron gate leading to exterior

agents.ego_description: exploring the grand hall, ascending staircases and examining the Hogwarts crest on the wall

notable_agents.action: distant student figure standing near the wall

entered.detail: intricate ribbed stone vaulting high overhead
wide stone staircase with ornate balustrades leading upward
carved stone railings with gothic tracery
large silver crest with H and animal symbols mounted on wall
framed portraits of historical figures in gilded frames
elegant brass lanterns with glowing candles
tall wrought iron gates with decorative scrollwork

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent grand hall with soaring gothic vaulted ceilings and elaborate stone staircases. The space features ornate balustrades, portrait paintings, and a prominent silver Hogwarts crest illuminated on the wall. The character ascends the stairs, passes a distant student, and approaches the large iron gates at the far end of the hall.

events.description: exits building into exposed snowy environment with night sky visible

agents.ego_description: walking out into the snowy courtyard, heading toward the open castle grounds

entered.detail: thick layer of snow covering the courtyard floor
tall stone castle walls with towers and battlements
large stone archway with columns framing the exit
dark blue night sky with heavy clouds

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the iron gates and stone archway into an open courtyard blanketed in snow. The environment shifts to exposed night conditions with a cloudy dark sky overhead and massive castle walls surrounding the snowy grounds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, candlelit interior of a Gothic castle out into a cold, snowy courtyard at night. It begins in the vast Great Hall, gliding past long dining tables and house banners beneath a vaulted ceiling illuminated by thousands of floating candles. As the character exits through large oak doors, the space tightens into a narrow stone corridor lined with iron sconces, medieval tapestries, and suits of armor. The scene then expands into a magnificent grand hall with soaring ceilings and ornate stone staircases, where the camera ascends past a silver crest and a distant student toward a set of iron gates. Finally, the camera passes through a stone archway, shifting abruptly from the ornate interior to an open courtyard blanketed in snow under a dark, cloudy night sky.
